name: restaurants
extraction_prompt:
Extract the following from this restaurant website. Return JSON only, no other text.

Fields to extract:
- cuisine_types: list of cuisine types (italian, japanese, mexican, etc.)
- price_range: price range ($ / $$ / $$$ / $$$$)
- menu_highlights: list of signature or popular dishes
- dietary_options: dietary accommodations (vegan, gluten-free, halal, kosher, etc.)
- reservations: whether they accept reservations (true/false)
- delivery: whether they offer delivery (true/false)
- private_dining: whether they have private dining options (true/false)
- happy_hour: whether they have happy hour and details
- outdoor_seating: true/false
- parking: parking availability details
- year_established: year if mentioned

If information is not found, use null for that field.
content_templates: Best Brunch Spots in {city} According to Recent Reviews ({year})
Where to Eat in {city} This Week: Trending Spots ({year})
Best Restaurants for Date Night in {city} ({year})
Outdoor Dining in {city}: Best Patios and Terraces ({year})
